A trust, a banking company \excluding cooperatives), a corporation, an assoclatlon, institution, a body registered as a Society under any law for the time being in force (excluding co- operatives), a firm registered under the Indian Partnership Act, J 932 (9 of 1932), a local authority and Regimental fund and Welfare FunJ. "(aa) "banking company" means a company as defined in section S of the Banking Regulation Act, I 949 (10 of 1949); (ab) "company" means a company as defined in the Companies Act, 1956 (I of 1956); (ac) "corporation" means a corporation established by or under any law for the time being in force; (ad) "regimental fund" means any fund established by the armed forces of the Union for the welfare of the retired or serving members of such force and their dependents"; {ii) in rule 4, in the Table below sub-rule (2), under the heading "C-lnstitutional Accounts", after SI.
